description: Lead end-to-end product strategy and technical backlog management within enterprise data grids. Directed the cloud-native migration of high-volume financial data assets, driving cross-functional Program Increment (PI) planning across multiple workstreams. Successfully engineered automated validation controls that reduced downstream exceptions by 35%. Promoted technical innovation by designing custom GenAI workflows that cut ad-hoc data development overhead and technical setup time by 40-50%.

Executed data-driven problem solving and business intelligence initiatives for Fortune 500 enterprises. Partnered with cross-functional stakeholders to translate complex business challenges into structured analytical frameworks. Built automated reporting dashboards, performed deep-dive statistical analysis, and delivered actionable insights that optimized operational efficiency and product strategy.
